task_completion.description: Log into the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Nx Witness Web Admin dashboard or settings interface, indicating successful login with the provided admin credentials.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the User Management or Users section
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Users', 'User Management', or 'System Administration' section is active and visible in the web interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the new user's login, full name, email, and password in the creation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create User' or 'Add User' form is open with the following fields filled: Login as 'mike.chen', Full Name as 'Mike Chen', Email as 'mike.chen@security.local', and the password field filled (likely obfuscated with dots/asterisks).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Viewer' role to the new user
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Role dropdown, radio button, or selection list in the user creation form is set to 'Viewer'.

task_completion.description: Verify the user 'mike.chen' appears in the system user list
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main user list is displayed showing 'mike.chen' or 'Mike Chen' alongside the existing system users, confirming the account was successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to create the user
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating to https://localhost:7001/static/index.html and interacting with the web elements, rather than using terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Nx Witness VMS software
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the genuine Nx Witness Web Admin UI, not a text editor, HTML mockup, or manipulated DOM.

integrity.description: Agent actually went through the creation process
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a logical progression of screenshots showing the form being opened, filled out, and submitted, rather than just jumping to a modified user list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task takes place in the Nx Witness VMS Web Admin interface at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html. The system initially has 6 users (admin + 5 others). The agent must use the GUI to create a new user. 'Viewer' is a valid predefined role in Nx Witness. Passwords are typically obfuscated in the UI, so verify the password field is filled even if the exact text 'SecureVMS2024!' cannot be read. The final success state must show 'mike.chen' added to the user list, making it 7 users total.
